Vs3/Vl3 N=2 K32 full-cycle dt/20 live sweep

Generated 2026-07-09 20:37:28. Rerun python3 rice_mele_reference/make_vs3_n2_k32_sweep_full20_live_report.py to refresh from current files.

Eight cases are shown below. Each case has three compact phase-axis plots: transport, ECG-grid difference, and ECG health. New grid references use initial_pathpad_N2_K32.csv; old K24 grid CSV is used only as a temporary fallback until the new grid sweep finishes. ECG data here use fixed dt=0.0005 for the full cycle, i.e. global dt/20 relative to the base dt=0.01.
case ECG progress ECG ETA grid progress grid ETA matched phase/pi ECG-grid Delta P min Re(A+B) res

gauss sigma=0.5 n/a% n/a 100.00% 0 min n/a n/a n/a n/a

gauss sigma=1.5 n/a% n/a 100.00% 0 min n/a n/a n/a n/a
gauss sigma=2 n/a% n/a 100.00% 0 min n/a n/a n/a n/a
gauss sigma=3 n/a% n/a 100.00% 0 min n/a n/a n/a n/a
